entries.question: RoboLab 的全局定位是什么？
entries.source_content: benchmark platform, RoboLab-120, scene/task generation, policy analysis

entries.question: real-to-sim evaluation 在 RoboLab 中如何落地？
entries.source_content: scale scene/task generation instead of per-scene video reconstruction

entries.question: scene/task/env 三步如何生成？
entries.source_content: place objects, define task instruction, instantiate env with robot/policy/variations

entries.question: LLM task code 如何验证和修复？
entries.source: Paper III-A2 + Appendix D + taskgen skill
entries.source_content: syntax/resource/feasibility validation and repair prompt loop

entries.question: 能力轴和难度分数怎么定义？
entries.source_content: visual/procedural/relational axes, multi-label attributes, subtask difficulty

entries.question: SPARC 为什么衡量轨迹平滑度？
entries.source_content: spectral arc length of end-effector speed profile

entries.question: MNPE 如何解释扰动敏感性？
entries.source_content: learn posterior over variation parameters conditioned on rollout outcome

entries.question: Appendix C-C baseline 到底是什么？
entries.source_content: LLM object selection plus grid/jitter one-pass scene baseline

entries.question: 论文实验的证据链是什么？
entries.source_content: policy benchmark, granular analysis, sensitivity, real-world verification, generation quality

entries.question: scene prompt 为什么这样写？
entries.source: Paper Appendix C Stage I + prompt figures
entries.source_content: real-world scene principles, JSON-only contract, object catalog, placement types, size limits

entries.question: Spatial/Physical/Feedback 怎么串起来？
entries.source: Paper Appendix C-B + Algorithm 1/Figure 17/Algorithm 2 + source files
entries.source_content: 2D base pose solving, 3D place-on/place-in, feedback to LLM repair

entries.question: 本文和 Gaussian/2026 前沿路线有什么关系？
entries.source: Paper real-to-sim discussion + MNPE KDE + NVIDIA sources
entries.source_content: RoboLab is not primarily per-scene Gaussian reconstruction; frontier methods are adjacent extensions

entries.question: 评测侧还有哪些核心内容没讲透？
entries.source_content: success-score gap, language variants, complexity sweeps, event tracking, confidence, real-world correlation

entries.question: 单条 rollout 如何变成论文级结论？
entries.source_content: video, HDF5, JSONL, event log, dashboard have different evidence roles

entries.question: 真实策略评测 runtime 主链是什么？
entries.source_content: task selection, episode loop, policy client, summary/result writing

entries.question: 多 env/action chunk/WorldState/EventTracker 状态边界是什么？
entries.source_content: env_id isolation, action chunk cache, predicate state, sparse failure events, artifact loading

entries.question: 审稿人视角怎么看这篇论文？
entries.source: Paper full text + Limitations + reproduction evidence
entries.source_content: strengths, weaknesses, reproducibility risk, future innovation routes

entries.question: 读完 RoboLab 后该补哪些来源？
entries.source: RoboLab related work + official project/source links
entries.source_content: 2026-first reading map across policies, benchmarks, assets, real data, world models

boundary: This validates source/question coverage for the lecture index; it does not re-verify paper claims or execute RoboLab.
